rationale: The citing article is an invited methodological review on econometric policy-simulation diagnostics and explicitly screens many JMR papers from 1998–2003, while the cited article is a specific empirical late-entrant diffusion application in cellular services. With only one DOI match and no contextual quote/title in the reference evidence, this looks most consistent with being included as part of a literature list/sample rather than a substantive theory or method dependency.
